/CAL:DEFT MOTION TO RELEASE TO PROGRAM/DAWT/ACM/DEF:IS EXPECTED AT HEALTHRITE 360 ON TUESDAY 07-23-19 AND REPORT TO ACM 5X PER WEEK/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:TO REPORT ANY ARREST, CITATION OR LAW ENFORCEMENTCONTACT TO AN SFSD COMMUNITY PROGRAMS EMPLOYEE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE; SUBMITTO A DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY SFSD; NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS; NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL/MARIJANA; NOT CONSUME ANY RELATED SUBSTANCE WITHOUT APRESCRIPTION, REMAINWITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY SFSD OR DETERMINED BY PROGRAM, CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES OF SHERIFF'S EM OFFICE WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL; ENGAGE ONLY IN PRE-APPROVED ACTIVITIES; ATTENDCOUNSELING OR GROUPS AS DIRECTED/ /DEF:SHALL BE FITTEDWITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY, SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:HEARINGS ON 07-26-19 & 08-12-19 ARE CONFIMRED,/
